framing_note: This JSON is a pipeline-regression smoke baseline produced against the synthetic seed_smoke.sql fixture. The grounding_rate here measures the ratio of distinct fact_ids covered by fact_evidence rows IN THE FIXTURE — not BrainCore's grounding quality on a natural corpus. Do NOT cite this value as a representative grounding claim. The public README's grounding metric comes from a separate production-corpus benchmark against a naturally-populated BrainCore instance.
notes: Computed directly from SELECT count(DISTINCT fact_id) FROM preserve.fact_evidence / SELECT count(*) FROM preserve.fact. The bun src/cli.ts eval --run subcommand is implemented but does not emit a grounding_rate metric in its eval_run.metrics JSONB payload; its aggregate metrics are entity F1, fact-count ratio, and root-cause / fix-summary match rates. See the module docstring for the full rationale.
